programme.title: Speed Zone
programme.desc: Despite the polices preemptive strike the illegal coast-to-coast car race is still on with new drivers Its a race where fair play red lights stop signs police roadblocks and traffic rules in general have no validity

programme.title: Caddyshack 2
programme.desc: A real estate tycoon vows revenge when his membership in a luxurious club is rejected So he strikes back by buying the club and turning it into an amusement park

programme.title: Corvette Summer
programme.desc: High school graduate Kenneth W Dantley Junior and Vanessa a hooker-in-training try to track down his custom-made newly-stolen Corvette

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Suzanne doesnt know if boyfriend Alan loves her for her self or her money Mason falls for Alicia but her terrier doesnt like him Isaac falls for Selena who is engaged to someone else

programme.title: The One Eyed Soldiers
programme.desc: A doctors unexpected death in a central European republic sets a series of chilling events into motion

programme.title: Springtime in the Rockies
programme.desc: Broadway partners Vicky Lane and Dan Christy have a tiff over Christys womanizing Jealous Vicky takes up with her old flame and former dance partner Victor Price and Dans career takes a nosedive In hopes of rekindling their romance and getting Vicky back on the boards with him Dan follows her to a ritzy resort in the Canadian Rockies where she and Victor are about to open their new act But things get complicated when Dan wakes after a bender to find that hes hired an outlandish Latin secretary Rosita Murphy which makes Vicky think hes just up to his old tricks again

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: The Fastest Gun Alive
programme.desc: In the western frontier town of Cross Creek storekeeper George Temple is a polite and soft spoken man with a secret past When 3 bank robbers on the lam stop in town to change horses Georges past comes back to haunt him

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: The Shady Rest is still at risk as Homer Bedloe is still pressuring the bank to collect the final payment for the mortgage Kate and the others come up with a way to save the Shady Rest and the Cannonball Express

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Uncle Joe decides to run as the first mayor of Hooterville

programme.desc: A man with a fear of the dark accepts a job working in the dark sewers of Springwood And a video store clerk keeps having nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: After the death penalty is abolished an executioner continues his former job through freelancing

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A greedy woman makes the mistake of murdering her husband while an escaped mental patient dressed in a Santa Claus outfit is on the loose

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Jane works for a company that provides various online services including sex chat with an online sex operator Her deadbeat husband Robert obsessively chats with operator named Liz She tells him to kill his wife Or is he imagining it

programme.title: Hitchhiker 509
programme.desc: A homeless conman couple tries to swindle a seemingly senile old lady out of her home by trying to convince her that the war is still on Big mistake

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick suspects a cover-up in the attempted rape of a police captains wife and her subsequent shooting of the attacker

programme.title: Friday 13th the Series
programme.desc: Ryan believes that a half-man half-monster comic-book hero has come to life and is responsible for the murder of a shopkeeper

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Urulu puts a curse on Binghamton when Binghamton refuses to arrange for monetary compensation for damages inflicted on Urulus island by the Navys cannon boats

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The pilot episode that tells the tale of a tiny ship which set off on a three-hour tour but got caught in a storm and beached on an island The pilot was filmed in November 1963 and not aired until almost 30 years later

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans 310
programme.desc: Hogans 310

programme.title: Hogans 304
programme.desc: Hogans 304

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A 3-Sister Singing Act is stranded on a deserted island and McHale and The 73 Crew have an ulterior motive when they volunteer for the rescue mission But the girls having had such experiences in the past are wise to their plan

programme.title: The Police Connection
programme.desc: When a “mad bomber” THE RIFLEMAN himself Chuck Connors – as the police computer classifies his suspect type – blows up a high school and a hospital Lieutenant Geronimo Minneli Vince Edwards TV’s BEN CASEY is on his trail He may have a witness in a young mute woman who was raped at the hospital just before the explosion but she is too ashamed to identify her attacker In any case Minneli reasons that it is unlikely that the bomber would stop to rape a woman after planting the bomb and that the rapist and the bomber are likely different people; therefore the rapist himself might be the only one who can help the police catch him Since the police do not know the bomber’s modus operandi but they do know the rapists Minneli starts questioning his past victims

programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Liberation sends a team to destroy the scarecrow probe before the Taelons crack it Joshua Doors is appointed as secretary of Human-Taelon relations

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The remaining members of the team set up a new home and try to deal with their grief The Morthren also have to find a fresh refuge and as part of this they kidnap and duplicate a priest who runs a homeless shelter

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes emerald-making machine threatens Columbias monopoly on the precious gems bringing him to the governments notice But his greed hides a deeper and more sinister agenda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp thing finds some eggs in the swamp and this makes him start dreaming about when he was human and was in love

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alpha Moonbase needs a rare ore known as Milgonite which is detected on an extremely dry planet Koenig leads a small landing force and discovers a glowing rock formation which comes alive and cuts off the partys links with the base It is a trap - the planet needs water to survive and has lured the travellers there for the water in their bodies

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF must thwart four young Nazis from claiming Hitlers fortune which they plan to use to finance a Fourth Reich

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A young concert violinist virtuoso begins to buckle under both the strain of performing and the demands of his authoritative manager Max himself a former violinist Kimble suspects he might resort to a desperate act to rid himself of Max

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Filip Verlinden v. Ibrahim El Boustati

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Amanda Buckner v. Julie Kedzie

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Talon poses as a DJ to infiltrate HQs annual Missionball Ball and trap all the guests with his hypnotic speakers

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill uses Halleys Comet to sneak past the Star Fortress which is guarding the Earth against Renegade attack

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill infiltrates the Guardian training academy planning to disrupt the graduation ceremonies

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss invents a thermal ray which dangerously overheats the Prides engines forcing the Lightning League to land on Sandeen in search of amethysts a cooling gem which can protect the engines This is Saw Boss plan A prisoner Antar escapes

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Saw Boss is capturing all the scientists of a Brain Trust by luring them with a false message from Audric to his radiation surrounded base Jayce stumbles upon the plan and smuggles himself Flora Gillian Oon and the vehicles onto the base

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM kidnaps panda bears from China and transports them Easter Island Its up to MASK figure out how to rescue the bears who have been put in harms way

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM terrorizes Tokyo Japan using a new vehicle called Blackout which is capable of draining electrical power supplies

programme.desc: The D-Boy File

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Penny and Talon compete to solve the mystery of the Sphinx while Gadget is stuck with a riddle of his own
